what_was_done: Session 646: Fixed bridge not launching — removed stale mcpOAuth from .credentials.json (was bypassing stdio bridge), made upstream connect lazy in toolshed_bridge.py (init 3.2s→1.8s).

Gate 17: injection_attempts type mismatch can crash gate (HIGH)

Gate 2: Unicode non-breaking space bypasses rm -rf regex (MEDIUM)
Gate 17: plaintext injection phrases not scanned on PreToolUse (MEDIUM)

last_response_preview: Session 646: Fixed toolshed bridge. Root causes: (1) .credentials.json had stale mcpOAuth entries — CC connected via HTTP+OAuth instead of spawning stdio bridge. (2) Bridge blocked stdio on _startup() upstream connect. Fixes: removed mcpOAuth, made connect lazy. Restart CC to activate.
